query:
-- WEST region (March 20): arizona, villanova, miami_fl, purdue + BYU/Texas (already published)
-- MIDWEST region (March 20): texas_tech, alabama, virginia, kentucky, iowa_st + Michigan/Howard (already published)
UPDATE games SET gameDate = '2026-03-20'
WHERE id IN (1830095, 1830096, 1830097, 1830098, 1830099, 1830103, 1830104, 1830105, 1830106)
AND sport = 'NCAAM';
command:
